title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Zebronics

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Zebronics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zebronics! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zebronics:
Zebronics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zebronics!
